notes_for_consumers: Feeds environment prompts and footage queries. West is the most geographically varied BC — sub-regional variance (Pacific Coast, Inland/Mountain West, Great Basin, California) dwarfs every other BC, so a sub-region should be declared before season makes full sense. Use the regional_specificity dial: low = average to a generic 'West' (fog, evergreen, gray); high = sharpen to a named sub-region. Income skews lower than GL/SW (5th-6th decile); most plural BC; fastest visitation decline.

subregions: Inland NW & Mountain West (E. WA, ID, MT, WY, CO mtns, UT)
Great Basin (NV, UT west, E. OR)

winter.retail_moment: Big Finish (Dec), Black Friday (Nov), Start Something New (Jan)
winter.weather: sub-region dependent. Pacific Coast: mild and wet, 40s-50s, near-constant rain, snow rare at sea level. Inland NW / Mountain West: real winter, subzero MT/WY interior, sustained mountain snow, powder culture. Great Basin: cold and dry, bitter wind. CA inland: mild, valley fog, dry; Sierra snow at elevation.
winter.light: Pacific NW gray, soft, low-contrast, marine; Mountain West clear, sharp, blue-sky-and-snow; CA golden but lower-angle, shorter days
winter.landscape: Coastal NW evergreen-and-moss rainforest, wet asphalt, urban-coastal density (Seattle, Portland); Mountain snow-and-conifer alpine, ski-town infrastructure; Great Basin high desert, sage, distant mountain backdrop; CA oak-grass-and-vineyard inland, redwood-and-coastline coastal
winter.activity_rhythm: ski and snow-sports peak in the mountains; coastal storm-watching, winter salmon runs, indoor trades work; construction slows in mountains, continues in CA; trucks plow in mountains, support ski ops, haul gear
winter.cgi_footage_implication: West winter cells need a sub-region declared before season makes sense. Use regional_specificity to average to generic 'West' (fog, evergreen, gray) or sharpen to Pacific Coast / Mountain West / Great Basin / California.

spring.retail_moment: Declaration of Deals (Mar-Apr), 4x4 Day, Truck Month
spring.weather: Coastal NW still wet through April, drying May; Mountain West high-elevation snow into June, valleys thawing; Great Basin warming, windy; CA full bloom, golden hills greening then drying
spring.light: brightening across region; CA spring light famous through April; NW slowly emerging from gray
spring.landscape: CA super-bloom in good years, wildflower coast and foothills, vineyards greening; NW forest understory blooming, creeks running high; Mountain valley grass-and-pasture greening as melt begins
spring.activity_rhythm: mountain construction restarting; coastal salmon and crab seasons; ranching calving and branding; mountain biking lower elevations; trucks support ranching, ag-supply, recreation hauling

summer.retail_moment: Make This The Summer Event, Summer of Jeep
summer.weather: sub-region dependent. Coastal NW mild and dry (70s-80s, weeks without rain); Inland WA/OR hot and dry, wildfire season; Mountain West warm days, cool alpine nights; Great Basin hot and dry; CA coastal mild, inland hot, Central Valley brutal, wildfire season
summer.light: Pacific NW long days, golden evening, clear; Mountain alpine-bright; CA golden in evening, hazy in heat
summer.landscape: NW dry brown lowland grass, dense green forest, salmon running; Mountain wildflower bloom, snow at highest elevations into July; CA dry-gold hills, heavy vineyards, episodic wildfire smoke; coastal kelp-and-beach culture
summer.activity_rhythm: hiking, camping, rafting, mountain biking, climbing, fishing at peak; national-park visitation peak (Glacier, Yellowstone, Tetons, Yosemite, Olympic, Rainier); coastal surf/kayak/beach; trucks haul recreational gear, support outdoor tourism and wildfire/forest-service work; construction full pace

fall.weather: cooling fast in mountains (first snow at altitude Sept-Oct); coastal NW returns to gray and rain by November; CA hot through October, Santa Ana fire-risk peak, cooling November; Mountain West aspen color late Sept-early Oct
fall.light: aspen gold against conifer green and blue sky is the signature Mountain West fall image; CA low-angle golden, smoke-tinged in fire years; NW gray return
fall.landscape: aspen turn (CO, WY, MT, ID, UT, E. OR); larch turn in NW Cascades; vineyard harvest (CA, OR, WA wine country); ski resorts prepping; hunting season opens
fall.activity_rhythm: hunting (elk, deer, antelope Mountain West; deer and elk NW); football and college football; fall fishing; vineyard harvest; wildfire-response tail; trucks haul hunting, harvest, recreation gear
